description: Meetup event page is parseable; details link strips tracking params and markdown links in the description become HTML anchors (Fusion LA Israel, Jun 7 2026)

events.title: The New VC Playbook - Investing in vibe coders, solo-founders & builders
events.location: Google for Startups, 12 HaOmanim st., Tel-Aviv, al
events.details: https://www.meetup.com/fusion-la-israel/events/314842056 ​Fusion VC, Google for Startups, Poalim Tech and AI Builders Israel invite you to a special morning event focused on one of the biggest shifts happening in the startup ecosystem right now: ​***The rise of AI-native builders, solo founders, vibe coders, and lean startup teams building faster than ever before.*** ​As AI tools reshape product development, distribution, and company building, the traditional venture capital playbook is evolving as well. ## ​RSVP HERE * ​What does the next generation of startups look like? * ​What are investors looking for in 2026? * ​Can solo founders build venture-scale companies? * ​And how should founders think about fundraising, velocity, and execution in the AI era? ​Join leading founders, operators, and investors for an honest discussion about the future of building and investing. ## ​What We’ll Cover: * ​The new pre-seed benchmarks in the AI era * ​How AI-native startups are built differently * ​Solo founders vs. traditional teams * ​The rise of vibe coding and ultra-lean execution * ​What top VCs are looking for in 2026 * ​How founders can move faster with AI tools * ​Real lessons from builders already scaling AI products ## ​Agenda ​10:00-10:10 - Opening Remarks ​\*\*Seffi Tsarfati\*\* Head of Strategic Partnerships, VC & Startups Google ​10:00-10:30 - The New Pre-Seed Benchmarks ​\*\*Amit Shechter\*\* Principal Fusion VC ​10:30-11:15 - Founders & Builders Panel ​\*\*Ben Lavi\*\* Founder, nCode 5 Micro SaaS Founder ​\*\*Niv Abutbul\*\* Co-Founder & CTO Kadabra AI ​\*\*Stav Brener\*\* Founder Automagic ​\*\*Yahav Fuchs\*\* Founder ReddGrow AI ​Moderator: Heli Netanel Co-Founder & CPO Automation Flow ​11:15-12:00 - Investors Panel - The New Playbook ​\*\*Lia Cromwell\*\* Partner UpWest VC ​\*\*Roni Bonjack\*\* Founder & Managing Partner Stealth VC ​\*\*Yael Alroy\*\* Managing Partner Stardom VC ​Moderator: Adi Hoorvitch Lavi, PhD SVP Poalim Tech ## ​Who Should Attend * ​Early-stage founders * ​AI builders & developers * ​Solo founders * ​Startup operators * ​CTOs & product leaders * ​Investors interested in the future of AI-native startups ## ​RSVP HERE ​The event is free of charge, but registration is required and subject to approval due to limited capacity. Location Google for Startups Campus Ha-Umanim St 12, Tel Aviv-Yafo, 6789731, Israel
